name: shangbing-famou-skills
description: 上兵伐谋 ShangBing FaMou — winning without war. The Art of War's doctrine of subduing the opponent without fighting, infused into AI strategic and game-theoretic reasoning.

plugins.name: shangbing-famou
plugins.description: 上兵伐谋 — wins by reshaping the game so conflict dissolves, never by deceiving a person. Collaborative stratagem and total victory (全胜) over aggressive manipulation.
